title: oenothera californica subsp. eurekensis
intro: Oenothera californica subsp. eurekensis, also known as the Eureka evening primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oenothera californica subsp. eurekensis include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
